title: Workday Extend Application
description: Schema for a Workday Extend custom application registration.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Extend application

name.description: The registered name of the application

description.description: Detailed description of the application purpose and functionality

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the application

createdOn.description: Timestamp when the application was created

lastModified.description: Timestamp when the application was last modified

href.description: The API resource URL for this application

ResourceReference.description: A reference to a Workday resource

id.description: The Workday ID of the referenced resource

descriptor.description: The display name of the referenced resource
